author: pk910
content: gas estimation is a unnnecesarry extra round trip to the el client 😄 would just bump the limit instead. I didn't bump it when switching the contract  and the new contract writes them to the EVM storage which is expensive

author: barnabasbusa
content: its a one off deposit tho no?

author: pk910
content:
there are quite regular top ups too.
And the gas estimation can be buggy as it doesn't include potential other pending deposits.

author: barnabasbusa
content: so wouldn't htat just make the hardcoded one fail too?

author: pk910
content:
no.  just set the hard coded high enough.   it doesn't matter if the limit is 4M  and the tx only consumes 200k or so.
it doesn't even cost more

author: pk910
content:
high enough =  assume initialization fee for 7 new storage slots.
that's what you have to pay when extending the queue through the uninitialized storage range (worst case)
